items.description: Create a runStep() abstraction in adws/src/agent-sdk.ts that encapsulates the per-step boilerplate: usage tracking, logging, finalize, comment posting, status updates, and early return on failure
Migrate adw_plan_build_review.ts to use the new runStep() abstraction, reducing per-step boilerplate to a single function call

Migrate all remaining workflow files to use runStep(), eliminating duplicated failure-handling blocks across adw_plan_build.ts, adw_plan_build_test.ts, adw_plan_build_test_review.ts, adw_plan_build_document.ts, and adw_sdlc.ts
steps_to_verify: RUN: grep -rL 'runStep' adws/workflows/adw_plan_build*.ts adws/workflows/adw_sdlc.ts -- expect no output

items.description: Create a createSDK() factory function in adws/src/agent-sdk.ts that accepts only model and cwd, encapsulating the repeated permissionMode, allowDangerouslySkipPermissions, and settingSources options
Update all step functions (runPlanStep, runBuildStep, runReviewStep, etc.) to use createSDK() instead of inline SDK instantiation
Align quickPrompt() to return QueryResult instead of string | null, matching the convention of all other step functions
steps_to_verify: RUN: grep -A2 'quickPrompt' adws/src/agent-sdk.ts | grep -q 'QueryResult' -- expect match

items.description: Consolidate ADWState (used in adw_plan.ts, adw_test.ts) and standardizeGetAdw() (used in most others) into a single ADW record pattern with a clear interface
steps_to_verify: RUN: grep -rn 'standardizeGetAdw\|ADWState' adws/src/ -- expect single unified pattern

items.description: Rename or replace standardizeGetAdw() to accurately reflect its behavior (reads env vars, does not fetch from a database)
Consolidate allStepUsages[] and stepStatuses[] into a single array with { step, ok, usage } shape (the adw_sdlc.ts pattern) across all workflows
Standardize GitHub issue comment format across all workflows to use a single consistent template (e.g. 'Step 1/3 PLAN completed ✅ (42s)')
steps_to_verify: RUN: grep -rn 'commentStep' adws/workflows/ | grep -v 'createCommentStep' -- expect consistent format

items.description: Add GitHub issue comment support to adw_plan_build_document.ts, which currently lacks it while all other multi-step workflows have it

Harden extractPlanPath() to avoid the mtime fallback in concurrent environments by requiring the plan step to return a deterministic path (e.g. specs/plan-{adwId}.md) rather than relying on directory scanning
steps_to_verify: RUN: grep -q 'adwId' adws/src/utils.ts | grep -q 'extractPlanPath' -- expect match

items.description: Make the cron trigger workflow-configurable instead of hardcoded to adw_plan_build, allowing issue labels or comment keywords to select which workflow to invoke
steps_to_verify: RUN: grep -v 'adw_plan_build' adws/triggers/cron.ts | grep -q 'workflow' -- expect match

items.description: Update /create-adw command template to use the new runStep() abstraction, createSDK() factory, and unified comment format so newly generated workflows follow the standardized patterns
Update /port-adw command template to reference the same standardized patterns as /create-adw
